body.title: pe: Seed ENTRY + CLAIM + READ_TICKET nodes
body.result: Seeded pe_chain.py with pe_entry_init/pe_claim/pe_read_ticket step functions + run_pe_entry_chain(). PROC_PE_CHAIN habit seeded. 22 tests passing. Basket pattern: each step takes/returns dict. No copy-on-fork.
body.description: Pure tool-call nodes: extract ticket_id from basket/TWM, claim_ticket(), read_ticket() → basket[ticket_description]. FORKIF chain, no LLM. Tests: basket has ticket_description after READ_TICKET fires.
